introSection: Batman The Ride is a steel 4th dimension roller coaster located at Six Flags Discovery Kingdom in Vallejo, California, USA. It was manufactured by S&S Worldwide and opened on May 25, 2019, with an official opening ceremony held three days later.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Batman The Ride is a 4D Free Spin from S&S Worldwide identical in layout to Batman The Ride at Six Flags Fiesta Texas and the Joker rides at many other Six Flags theme parks.

fullText:
Batman The Ride is a steel 4th dimension roller coaster located at Six Flags Discovery Kingdom in Vallejo, California, USA. It was manufactured by S&S Worldwide and opened on May 25, 2019, with an official opening ceremony held three days later.

Batman The Ride is a 4D Free Spin from S&S Worldwide identical in layout to Batman The Ride at Six Flags Fiesta Texas and the Joker rides at many other Six Flags theme parks.
